title: Barely Legendary Tooltips
description: Adds some new custom frames for use with Legendary Tooltips.
body:
This resource pack adds some new custom borders for use as you see fit for your game/modpack. 

Here are all of the borders included:

1. Oak
![Oak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc3a784402d4d2aee1388ad4d2c0d67d30119b4_0.webp)
   
2. Spruce
![Spruce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fbba0ae0d0db1adebcc34a155e4755d2992a0b0_0.webp)

3. Birch
![Birch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b00ab35b006b890d9a50f6a2bc13f0ede413b35_0.webp)

4. Jungle
![Jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb44add57702ae6b7a89978e1911e8b9dcb4d41_0.webp)

5. Acacia
![Acacia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b8839d129e107bab947432968700d8dfaee2dd2_0.webp)

6. Dark oak
![Dark oak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f26a1c76d4cbe0da8727b6f8529e2b918d4fc2ae_0.webp)

7. Mangrove
![Mangrove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ec64c3c6440a56cae39e4a1ac85b48aa8e6dd4_0.webp)

8. Cherry
![Cherry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b9f3237a163ff2ff0255e04fc839ad33503d46b_0.webp)

9. Pale oak
![Pale oak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a57b0213e1040c5de7bd95f2bd0190b59c4b09d9_0.webp)

10. Bamboo
![Bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cac0d8d1ae7c539a392dd1e7f876355acae4b42_0.webp)

11. Crimson
![Crimson](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6722c5a614164f738c05398a4024aaeafce4c2af_0.webp)

12. Warped
![Warped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8968bed30e7b9b022c173f057cd7d8c7b22fba_0.webp)

You need Legendary Tooltips mod for this resource pack to work, get it here: https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips
